memory_candidates.content: The generate_claudemd() function in shared/extensions/merge.lua builds .claude/CLAUDE.md by concatenating a header template from extensions/core/templates/claudemd-header.md with content fragments from each loaded extension's merge-sources/claudemd.md or EXTENSION.md. The sync operation (sync.lua) uses a different code path (inject_section with section markers). Both paths must be kept consistent when modifying generation behavior.

The extension system's CLAUDE.md is generated via merge.lua:generate_claudemd() as a fully computed artifact -- NOT via section injection with markers. The inject_section()/remove_section() functions still exist in merge.lua but are unused for CLAUDE.md. The section_id field in manifest merge_targets.claudemd is vestigial. Both load and unload call generate_claudemd() after state update.

The extension loader supports 12 provides categories: agents, skills, commands, rules, context, scripts, hooks, data, docs, templates, systemd, root_files. The loader.lua file has 12 public functions corresponding to these. Unload dependency handling is a hard block (not a warning with confirm) -- the function returns false before reaching the confirmation dialog.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive audit of extension system documentation vs Lua implementation
Implementation plan for extension docs consolidation: 4 phases, 4 hours estimated
Team implementation with 2 max concurrent teammates across 3 waves

active_projects.completion_summary: Consolidated extension system documentation: fixed 9 contradiction categories between docs and Lua implementation, aligned validators with actual index.json schema, deduplicated guides via cross-references to single source of truth (extension-system.md)
